cases.label: Centered nozzle
cases.tooltip: Single clear nozzle contour already near top-center.

steps.label: Centered detection
steps.tooltip: Nozzle is visible and already in the target top-center band.

cases.label: Left offset
cases.tooltip: Nozzle contour is valid but left of center.

steps.label: Left recenter
steps.tooltip: Capture a valid nozzle contour left of center so recenter is required.

cases.label: Right offset
cases.tooltip: Nozzle contour is valid but right of center.

steps.label: Right recenter
steps.tooltip: Capture a valid nozzle contour right of center so recenter is required.

cases.label: Low in frame
cases.tooltip: Nozzle contour is valid but too low in the frame.

steps.label: Low recenter
steps.tooltip: Capture a valid nozzle contour below the top target band.

cases.label: Near left edge
cases.tooltip: Valid contour close to the left image boundary.

steps.label: Left edge valid
steps.tooltip: Capture a valid nozzle contour near left image edge without clipping it entirely.

cases.label: Near right edge
cases.tooltip: Valid contour close to the right image boundary.

steps.label: Right edge valid
steps.tooltip: Capture a valid nozzle contour near right image edge without clipping it entirely.

cases.label: Two valid contours
cases.tooltip: Two valid contours where lower candidate should be selected.

steps.label: Lower candidate wins
steps.tooltip: Capture two valid candidates; lower contour should be selected deterministically.

cases.label: Tie by bottom
cases.tooltip: Bottom tie between candidates; larger area should win.

steps.label: Tie-break by area
steps.tooltip: Capture two candidates with similar bottom; larger area should be selected.

cases.label: No signal empty
cases.tooltip: No detectable foreground difference for droplet image.

steps.label: Empty no-signal
steps.tooltip: Capture a frame pair with effectively no droplet signal.

cases.label: No signal weak
cases.tooltip: Very weak foreground below no-signal threshold.

steps.label: Weak no-signal
steps.tooltip: Capture a faint signal that remains below no-signal threshold.

cases.label: None small area
cases.tooltip: Foreground exists but all contours are too small.

steps.label: Small-area reject
steps.tooltip: Capture foreground specks only; no contour should pass area filter.

cases.label: None short height
cases.tooltip: Foreground contour exists but fails minimum bbox height.

steps.label: Short-height reject
steps.tooltip: Capture a short contour that fails min-stream-height filter.

cases.label: None lower band only
cases.tooltip: Contour appears only below allowed top search band.

steps.label: Lower-band reject
steps.tooltip: Capture contour only in lower frame region; should be rejected by top-band filter.

cases.label: None speckle noise
cases.tooltip: Noisy speckle foreground that should not produce valid contour.

steps.label: Noise reject
steps.tooltip: Capture noisy diff frame with no valid nozzle stream contour.

cases.label: Warmup discard sequence
cases.tooltip: Sequence demonstrating warmup frame discard before valid detection.

steps.label: Baseline background
steps.tooltip: Background frame captured before warmup/measurement frames.

steps.label: Warmup throwaway
steps.tooltip: First droplet frame intended as warmup and discarded.

steps.label: Post-warmup valid
steps.tooltip: Second droplet frame after warmup, valid nozzle contour.

cases.label: Delay scan to success
cases.tooltip: Sequence that requires delay increments before valid detection.

steps.label: Baseline background
steps.tooltip: Background frame for this delay-scan sequence.

steps.label: Early delay none
steps.tooltip: Early flash delay frame should return NONE.

steps.label: Mid delay none
steps.tooltip: Mid flash delay frame should still return NONE.

steps.label: Late delay valid
steps.tooltip: Later flash delay frame returns valid nozzle contour.

cases.label: Pressure bump to success
cases.tooltip: Sequence requiring pressure bumps before valid detection.

steps.label: Baseline background
steps.tooltip: Background frame for pressure bump sequence.

steps.label: Base pressure no-signal
steps.tooltip: Base pressure frame should return NO_SIGNAL.

steps.label: Bump 1 no-signal
steps.tooltip: First pressure bump frame should still return NO_SIGNAL.

steps.label: Bump 2 valid
steps.tooltip: Second pressure bump frame should return valid contour.

cases.label: No-signal to abort
cases.tooltip: Sequence that stays no-signal until process aborts.

steps.label: Baseline background
steps.tooltip: Background frame for repeated no-signal abort sequence.

steps.label: Base no-signal
steps.tooltip: Base pressure frame returns NO_SIGNAL.

steps.label: Bump 1 no-signal
steps.tooltip: First pressure bump still no-signal.

steps.label: Bump 2 no-signal
steps.tooltip: Second pressure bump still no-signal.

steps.label: Cap reached abort
steps.tooltip: No-signal at pressure cap where process should abort.
